title: Chart Types in Datilio: When to Use Bars, Lines, and More
summary: Datilio chart options map to everyday business questions—pick the form that matches yours.

content.summary: Datilio chart options map to everyday business questions—pick the form that matches yours.

body.text: The best chart is the one that answers the question in five seconds. Compare regions, products, or reps with sorted bar charts when the question is categorical. Track weekly revenue or ticket volume with line charts on a date axis after confirming date types in preview.

body.alt: Abstract visualization representing AI and data
body.caption: Abstract visualization representing AI and data. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Bars and lines for common questions
Compare regions, products, or reps with sorted bar charts when the question is categorical.
Track weekly revenue or ticket volume with line charts on a date axis after confirming date types in preview.

items: Filter before charting to keep visuals readable.
Verify totals against filtered row sums.

body.text: Switch chart types in seconds when the first view feels wrong—that exploration is cheap in Datilio.
Save the filter context that made the chart meaningful.
Datilio charts stay tied to your upload and rules so switching views does not lose scope.

meta_description: Datilio chart options map to everyday business questions—pick the form that matches yours.
